title: lasianthus formosensis
intro: Lasianthus formosensis, also known as the Taiwan lasianthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae. This shrub-like plant is native to Taiwan and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The leaves and stems of Lasianthus formosensis have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal problems, due to their health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving digestion. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas or infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
